name: Windmill (Open-Source Developer Platform)
pricing_notes: Open source (AGPLv3); Windmill Cloud from $50/month; enterprise self-host

auth.notes: OAuth2 (GitHub, Google, SSO); API token for programmatic access

agent_readiness.notes: Open-source alternative to Retool/Airplane for internal tools + workflow automation. Scripts in Python, TypeScript, Go, Bash. Visual flow builder (DAG). Approval flows. Secret management. Resource management (database connections, API keys). Schedules and webhooks. TypeScript-first but multi-language. Auto-generates UI from function signatures. Strong REST API. Self-hostable with Docker. Used by engineering teams for internal automation and workflows.

gotchas: AGPLv3 license (must open-source modifications or use commercial license)
More opinionated than Prefect for data pipelines
Learning curve for visual flow builder
best_when: Internal developer tools and workflow automation
Teams wanting Retool/Airplane alternative with self-hosting
avoid_when: When AGPLv3 license conflicts with business model
summary: Windmill is an open-source developer platform for scripts, workflows, and internal tools. Multi-language (Python, TypeScript, Go, Bash), visual flow builder, approval workflows, secret management, and REST API. Open-source Retool/Airplane alternative. Best for engineering teams automating internal processes and building internal tools without vendor lock-in.
